AI Mixer Pro
AI Powered
32-bit Float
Real-time Processing
How It Works

Three Steps to
Professional Sound

01

Upload

Drop your audio file into the mixer. Supports WAV, MP3, FLAC, and more.

02

AI Processing

Our AI analyzes your track and applies professional-grade mixing instantly.

03

Download

Get your professionally mixed track in studio-quality 32-bit float WAV.

Features

Built for Creators

Professional-grade audio tools powered by cutting-edge artificial intelligence.

AI Stem Separation

Isolate vocals, drums, bass, and instruments with unprecedented accuracy.

Smart EQ Matching

AI analyzes reference tracks and automatically matches your EQ curve.

Intelligent Mixing

Automatic level balancing, panning, and space creation for every element.

Pro Compression

Dynamic processing that preserves transients while controlling dynamics.

Real-time Processing

Process audio in real-time with near-zero latency.

Multi-format Export

Export in WAV, MP3, FLAC, and more at any sample rate.

Testimonials

What Artists Say

"AI Mixer Pro has completely transformed my workflow. What used to take hours now takes minutes. The quality is indistinguishable from professional studio mixing."
Marcus Chen
Music Producer
"As someone without formal mixing training, this tool gives me results I could never achieve on my own. It's like having a professional engineer in my pocket."
Sarah Williams
Independent Artist
"The stem separation is incredible. I've been able to create remixes and acappellas that would have been impossible before."
DJ Thunder
Electronic Musician
Pricing

Simple Pricing

Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

Free

$0

Perfect for trying out the platform.

  • 3 tracks per month
  • Basic AI mixing
  • MP3 export only
  • Standard quality
Get Started
Most Popular

Pro

$19/month

For serious music creators.

  • Unlimited tracks
  • Advanced AI mixing
  • WAV & MP3 export
  • Studio quality (32-bit)
  • Stem separation
  • Priority processing
Start Free Trial

Studio

$49/month

For professional studios.

  • Everything in Pro
  • Batch processing
  • Custom AI models
  • API access
  • Dedicated support
  • White label options
Contact Sales
FAQ

Questions & Answers

Our AI analyzes your audio track and applies professional mixing techniques including EQ, compression, reverb, and more. It learns from thousands of professionally mixed tracks to deliver studio-quality results.
